title: begonia makuruyot
intro: Begonia makuruyot, also known as Begonia makuruyot or Makuruyot Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Begonia makuruyot include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin irritations. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or poultice for its various herbal preparations.
